a love story

Ather & Khushi

🌷

Together since February 2017

Nine years, two hearts, one beautiful story.

scroll ↓

counting down to

Our 10 Year Anniversary 🌸

—Days
—Hours
—Minutes
—Seconds

February 16, 2027 — a whole decade of us 💕

💌

My dearest Khushi,

There's a particular kind of magic in a first date at a small table — two people grinning too wide, not yet knowing they've just started something that will outlast every season that follows. That was us. Dunkin' Donuts, 10th grade, and a feeling neither of us quite had words for yet. I still carry that afternoon with me, tender as ever.

I love you for the way your mind works — quietly brilliant, always one step ahead. I love that you are so like me in all the ways that matter, and yet you bring everything I lack: your kindness that asks nothing in return, your humor that turns even hard days soft, your loyalty that has never once wavered. You make me feel complete. Seen. Certain. Home.

I think about the small things most. The drives to pick you up — that quiet ritual, the world narrowing down to just you at the curb. The times I was late and you let me hear about it, as you should have. And the doors — I would open them, and you would blush, and in that tiny moment everything was exactly right.

You have stood beside me through the storms I didn't think I'd survive. You never asked me to be more than I was — you simply loved me until I wanted to be. That is the rarest, most generous thing one person can do for another.

Almost three years across the world is not a small thing to carry. But I carry it gladly, because you are on the other side of it — out there building something brilliant as a corporate lawyer, because of course you are. I watch from here with so much pride it almost hurts. And I count the days.

Ten years is coming, my love. And I intend to spend every one after it with you too.

Forever and without hesitation,

Your Ather 🌸

"I have loved you since 9th grade, through every season and every distance — and I will love you still when there are no more miles between us."

— Ather, for Khushi

our story, frame by frame

Moments I'll never let go

🍩

Dunkin' Donuts

Our very first date — two 9th graders, probably nervous, definitely smiling too much. The beginning of everything we are.

☕

Espresso & Bella Vita

Our second date - The little table we claimed as our own, where time moved differently and the world felt very small and very ours.

🚗

Picking you up

The drives from and back to your college — a simple, steady ritual that felt like a quiet promise I kept making, day after day, just for you.

🕐

When I was late

You never let it slide — and you were right not to. Even your scolding was full of love, and I'd take it a thousand times over.

🚪

Opening the door

Every time I open the door for you, you'd blush. Every single time, my heart would catch. That little moment is one of my most precious memories.

🌍

Across the distance

Three years, two continents, different clocks — and still completely us. Not even an ocean could change what we are to each other.
